title: The Best VHS in the World
description: The same action you remember from that gold plastic video tape. Inexplicably your best friend’s favorite movie.
altHero: a pug dog driving a car
alt1: car being chased by a police car
alt2: car going up a ramp off a ramp
alt3: the car is caugh in the air by a UFO’s green beam
alt4: the cops shield their eyes as the UFO explodes
